hooks.command: CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ack\ *|*ag\ *|*cat\ *|*head\ *|*tail\ *|*ls\ *|*graph.json*|*networkx*)   [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] &&   echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"graphify: Knowledge graph exists. Use graphify query/explain/path instead of reading files directly. Only use Read/cat on a specific path graphify already gave you."}}'   || true ;; esac
